pullRequest.title: Update python set up step in workflows to use latest python version
Improve error message when trying to conditionally sample before fitting
`DataProcessor` should assign `'id'` sdtype to ID columns instead of `'text'`
Add ability to specify old transformer behavior for ID columns
Allow primary key to also be a foreign key
Add support for sdtype id context columns in PARSynthesizer
Add test showing PARSynthesizer doesn't create different sequences with the same sequence key (uniqueness is enforced)
Fix PARSynthesizer sampling for all-null column in the input data
Update `CSVHandler` to accept additional options when reading and writing
Detect numerical columns post-preprocessing for PARSynthesizer
pullRequest.body:
CU-86b4tc2jj, Resolve #2482.

This PR also reduces the number of epochs for the PAR integration tests. This speeds up the testing workflow by over 1 min.

Add an API for removing a column from the Metadata
Add an API for removing a table from the Metadata

Fix: `ValueError` being produced during date time formatting
Fix: SDV crashes when used on a read only system due to logging
Metadata should not pass validation if there are unrecognized keys

Add error message when fitting with empty metadata
Adding support for violin plot type
Release prep workflow checks for release candidate dependencies
[Fix] Original metadata object passed to ProgrammableConstraint
Rename version.public to version.community
Add support for conditional sampling null values
Add support for condtionally sampling column relationships and contextually anonymized columns
Add workflow to check that issues tied to PRs have a milestone

pullRequest.title: Feature branch for DayZParameters changes
[DayZ Parameters] DayZ parameter validation does not validate DAYZ_SPEC_VERSION

resolves #2725 

This PR also bumps the minimum version of RDT to 1.18.2, which resolves a bug in Faker

pullRequest.title: [Fix] Adding constraints to multi-table synthesizer in multiple steps causes fit to crash
Ensure `datetime_format` warning is only raised once
Add bucket and credentials parameter to download_demo

Change metadata visualization background color
Address failing style checks
[Fix] Combining column relationship with constraints not working
Update license info in pyproject.toml
Support python 3.14
[Feature] Metadata Composite Keys
When reading in CSV data, do not cut off any leading 0s
Pin pandas below 3.0
Add support for auto-detect when a primary key is also a foreign key in Metadata
pullRequest.body:
- Fixes #2788 
- This PR adds tests to verify that primary to primary key relationships can be detected and includes docstring fixes.
  - Previously, the primary key was excluded from the column name match via the metadata validation. However, once the metadata validation was updated to allow PK to PK, this enforcement was no present.

pullRequest.title: Add `__repr__` method to the CAGs
Update meta info with forum link
Make metadata auto-detection detect semantic sdtype as foreign key

Make `get_available_demos` integration test be more flexible for `single_table`
[Metadata] Raise a warning if the metadata and data columns differ.
[Fix] Metadata visualization shows table key not relationship key for relationships
pullRequest.body: Resolve #2839 The visualization now shows the discrepancy between the primary key set in the relationship and the table's actual primary key
